name: Free Mission Control for OpenClaw AI Agents
description: Set up JARVIS Mission Control — a free, self-hosted task and coordination hub for OpenClaw AI agents. Fork the GitHub repo, run locally, or connect to MissionDeck.ai for a cloud dashboard without hosting anything.
author: Asif2BD
changelog: v1.0.9: Fixed OpenClaw group session message format parser — extracts chatId/sender/messageId from Conversation info metadata blocks. Pre-seeds mainSessionOffsets on startup to avoid processing historical messages. v1.0.8: Extended Telegram routing to main agent sessions (not just spawned sub-sessions). v1.0.7: Telegram to MC auto-routing via /api/telegram/task.
